name: TOP_PATHWAYS_2024
description: Top pathways in 2024. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (pw:Pathway)<-[:IN_PATHWAY]-(t:Target)<-[:HAS_TARGET]-(tp:TargetPair)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year)
WHERE y.year = $year
RETURN pw.name AS pathway, count(DISTINCT tp) AS targetpair_count, count(DISTINCT p) AS patent_count, collect(DISTINCT tp.name)[0..5] AS example_targetpairs
ORDER BY targetpair_count DESC, patent_count DESC, pathway
LIMIT 10

examples: Across all target-pair combinations disclosed in 2024, which pathways appear most frequently? Please provide the top 10 and example target pairs.
Within the 2024 target-pair set, which pathways are the most common overall? Please list the top 10 and show representative target-pair examples.
Looking only at target-pair combinations from 2024, what are the most frequent pathways? Please return the top 10 with illustrative matching pairs.
